Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants to transform a Windows activity system log into a process mining event log Key steps 1 Data transformation Convert raw events into an event log format Case ID Activity Name Timestamp 2 Case identification Group related events into cases A case could represent working on a specific document handling an email or reviewing a PDF 3 Activity naming Translate raw low level actions into higher level process steps 4 Event attributes Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Can add others 5 Coherent narrative The final log should tell a story 6 Explanation Brief summary of grouping logic and activity naming

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets look at the log 085950 FOCUS Word Quarterly Report docx Case Quarterly Report docx 090000 FOCUS Word Document1 docx Case Document1 docx 090030 TYPING Word Document1 docx 090100 TYPING Word Document1 docx 090115 SAVE Word Document1 docx 090145 SWITCH to Chrome Email Inbox Case Email Inbox or just Email Annual Meeting 090200 CLICK Chrome Email Inbox Open Email about Annual Meeting 090230 SCROLL Chrome Email Inbox 090245 CLICK Chrome Email Inbox Reply to Email 090300 TYPING Chrome Email Inbox Meeting details confirmed 090320 CLICK Chrome Email Inbox Send Email 090400 SWITCH to Acrobat Report Draft pdf Case Report Draft pdf 090430 SCROLL Acrobat Report Draft pdf 090445 HIGHLIGHT Acrobat Report Draft pdf 090500 FOCUS Excel Budget 2024 xlsx Case Budget 2024 xlsx 090515 TYPING Excel Budget 2024 xlsx 090530 TYPING Excel Budget 2024 xlsx 090545 SAVE Excel Budget 2024 xlsx 090600 SWITCH to Word Document1 docx Case Document1 docx 090615 TYPING Word Document1 docx 090630 SAVE Word Document1 docx 090700 CLOSE Word Document1 docx 090715 FOCUS Word Quarterly Report docx Case Quarterly Report docx 090745 TYPING Word Quarterly Report docx 090800 SAVE Word Quarterly Report docx 090815 CLOSE Word Quarterly Report docx

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case IDs based on the primary resource document the user is working on Case Doc1 Document1 docx Case EmailMeeting Email Inbox Annual Meeting Case ReportPDF Report Draft pdf Case BudgetExcel Budget 2024 xlsx Case QReport Quarterly Report docx

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Wait the email window is Email Inbox the user opens Annual Meeting email replies sends Lets name the case Email Annual Meeting Wait at 085950 FOCUS Word Quarterly Report docx There is no action other than focus until 090715 I will just record the initial focus Actually lets create cases based on the resource or document being worked on

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 Document1 docx DOC1 090000 FOCUS Start Document Work 090030 TYPING Draft Content 090100 TYPING Draft Content 090115 SAVE Save Document 090600 SWITCH Resume Document Work 090615 TYPING Update Content 090630 SAVE Save Document 090700 CLOSE Close Document Case 2 Email Annual Meeting EMAIL 090145 SWITCH Navigate to Email 090200 CLICK Open Email Open Email 090230 SCROLL Review Email Content 090245 CLICK Reply Reply to Email 090300 TYPING Compose Reply 090320 CLICK Send Send Email Case 3 Report Draft pdf PDF 090400 SWITCH Navigate to PDF 090430 SCROLL Review PDF Content 090445 HIGHLIGHT Highlight Content Case 4 Budget 2024 xlsx EXCEL 090500 FOCUS Start Spreadsheet Work 090515 TYPING Update Data 090530 TYPING Update Data 090545 SAVE Save Spreadsheet Case 5 Quarterly Report docx QDOC 085950 FOCUS Open Document 090715 FOCUS Resume Document Work 090745 TYPING Draft Content 090800 SAVE Save Document 090815 CLOSE Close Document

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets refine Activity Names Instead of logging every FOCUS and SWITCH as separate high level activities if they just interrupt maybe Start Work Resume Work Pause Work But standard process mining maps every event to an activity Lets just use Open Application Document Draft Content Compose Reply Update Data Review Content Highlight Content Save Document Save Spreadsheet Send Email Close Document

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Attributes Case ID Timestamp Activity Name Resource Document App

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait the SWITCH events show that the user left a document Should we add an event Pause Work for DOC1 at 090145 If we want to track waiting times in process mining we do not strictly need Pause Work but it might be nice Actually process mining usually infers waiting time by the gap between events in the same case Eg DOC1 has Save Document at 090115 and Resume Document Work at 090600 The time between these two is the waiting time So no need for Pause Work

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The SWITCH at 090145 is a transition In the context of EMAIL case it is the start of the email task In the context of DOC1 it is the pause What about the SWITCH at 090400 For PDF case it is the start For EMAIL case it is the end after Send Email What about SWITCH at 090600 For DOC1 it is Resume Work For EXCEL it is a pause EXCEL does not have a close but we can leave it

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Activity Names should be standardized For DOC1 and QDOC Open Document Draft Content Save Document Resume Work Update Content Close Document For EMAIL Open Email Client Open Email Review Email Reply to Email Compose Reply Send Email For PDF Open PDF Review Content Highlight Content For EXCEL Open Spreadsheet Update Data Save Spreadsheet

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait in DOC1 there are two TYPING events I will label them both as Draft Content or Update Content Draft Content for the first part Update Content for the second part Or just standardize as Edit Content Edit Content is better

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets refine DOC1 Open Document Edit Content Edit Content Save Document Resume Work Edit Content Save Document Close Document EMAIL Switch to Email Client Open Email Review Email Content Initiate Reply Edit Content Send Email PDF Switch to PDF Reader Review PDF Content Highlight Content EXCEL Open Spreadsheet Edit Content Edit Content Save Spreadsheet QDOC Open Document Resume Work Edit Content Save Document Close Document

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Explanation Case Identification Cases are grouped by the specific resource document email spreadsheet PDF the user is interacting with For instance all interactions with Document1 docx belong to the DOC1 case Activity Naming Raw actions are abstracted to higher level process steps FOCUS and SWITCH actions are translated to Open Document when starting a case or Resume Work when returning to an open document TYPING and CLICK for writing are standardized to Edit Content Compose Reply etc SAVE and CLOSE are kept as standard end step activities Event Attributes The log includes Case ID Timestamp Activity Name and Resource Window Additional context like Application is also included
